name: Red Panda
lifespan: 8–10 years in the wild; up to 15 years in captivity
size: Body length 50–64 cm; tail 28–59 cm; weight 3–6.2 kg

name: Wolverine
lifespan: 7–12 years in the wild; longer in captivity

name: Okapi
lifespan: 15–20 years in the wild; up to 30 years in captivity

name: Shoebill
size: Height 110–140 cm; wingspan 2.3–2.6 m; weight 4–7 kg

name: Axolotl
lifespan: 10–15 years in captivity; often shorter in the wild

name: Cassowary
lifespan: 18–20 years in the wild; longer in captivity

name: Gila Monster
lifespan: 15–20 years in the wild; over 30 years in captivity
size: Length 30–56 cm; weight 350 g to over 1 kg

name: Maned Wolf
lifespan: 12–15 years in the wild; up to 17 years in captivity
